subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down through grace from the dominion of God, the Most High, the Most Great, wherein is mentioned that which draweth mankind nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالفضل من جبروت الله العلی العظیم و یذکر فیه ما یجذب الناس
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
